source_material.title: Malam Tujuh Likur Memory
source_material.description: A memory of preparations and lights before Hari Raya.
source_material.story_context: The contributor recalls preparing lamps and gathering with neighbours during Malam Tujuh Likur in the days before Hari Raya.

creative_goal: Introduce Malam Tujuh Likur as a living memory of light, prayer, preparation, and community before Hari Raya.
constraints: Do not present all Malay families as practising this in the same way.
Include a self-critical reflection on AI's role.
